message:
test(wave-63): trait coverage for jetstream, region, shutdown, postgres

RetentionPolicy/StorageType/DiscardPolicy Debug/Clone/Copy/Default/Eq,
StreamState Debug/Clone/Default, AdmissionKind/AdmissionError Debug/
Clone/Copy/Eq, RegionLimits Debug/Clone/Default/Eq, ShutdownPhase/
ShutdownStats Debug/Clone, SslMode/FrontendMessage/BackendMessage
Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq (postgres feature-gated).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
